title: Circular No. 06 of 2025 IR-Operations - Measures to Encourage filing of Returns by erstwhile Manual Filers of Income Tax Year 2024
text:
L
Government of Pakistan
Revenue Division
A
Federal Board of Revenue
Inland Revenue
* ***
C.No.6( 1 )S(I R-Operations)/2024/139820-R Islamabad, the 04th November, 2025
Circular No.6 of 2025-26 IR-Operations
Income Tax
Subject: Measures to Encourage filing of Returns by erstwhile Manual
Filers of Income Tax in Tax Year 2024
In order to digitize all data of FBR, the Manual returns are being
discouraged and FBR is now receiving returns through online system. That is
why the manual return form has been discontinued this year. However, the FBR
does understand the problems of a small fraction of people who were filing
manual returns till 2024. As a special dispensation it has been decided that a cell
in each tax office of Pakistan dealing with such taxpayers will provide all legal
and technical support to such taxpayers.
2. Such taxpayer’s return filing date is hereby extended till 30.11.2025 in
exercise of the powers conferred under Section 214A of the Income Tax
Ordinance, 2001, for smooth completion of the process. All such taxpayers are
requested to contact their respective tax offices where they shall be assisted in
registration and return filing free of cost. Even if they require legal assistance
die FBR field office will provide them service of a lawyer free of any cost this
year.
3. This issues with the approval of Member (IR-Operations% FBR.
C
Sad; Ih^an
Second Secretal IR-Operations
Distribution:
J. AH CCIRs ofLTOs, CTOs, MTO andRTOs.
2. SA to Chairman, FBR, Islamabad.
3. SA to Member (IR-Operations), FBR, Islamabad.
4. Chief (TPS), FBR, Islamabad with the request for issuance of press
release and placement on website,
